outcomes.2012_result: Retained House by 33 seats despite 1M+ fewer votes

ndrc.result: NYT called post-2020 maps 'the fairest in 40 years'

litigation_costs.post_2020_scope: 30 states, 100+ cases, 38+ pending Section 2 VRA cases

key_cases.rucho_v_common_cause_2019: Partisan gerrymandering non-justiciable in federal courts
key_cases.allen_v_milligan_2023: Upheld Section 2 VRA — ordered 2nd majority-Black AL district
key_cases.louisiana_v_callais: Pending — could gut Section 2, unlock 19+ GOP districts

independent_commissions.effectiveness: 42% of competitive district decline from gerrymandering

technology.hofeller: Pioneer of computer-aided redistricting; 70K+ files published posthumously; proved racial intent in NC maps

2024_2026_developments.texas_2025: Trump-urged redraw; 5 Dem seats targeted; SCOTUS stayed unconstitutional ruling 6-3
2024_2026_developments.california_2025: Bypassed commission; Prop 50: $215M total, Newsom $120M; voters approved
2024_2026_developments.missouri_2025: Special session new maps; targeting Cleaver seat
2024_2026_developments.florida_2026: DeSantis special session April 21; up to 5 seats
2024_2026_developments.virginia_2026: Dem amendment; referendum April 21; 3-4 Dem seats
2024_2026_developments.louisiana_v_callais: If SCOTUS guts Section 2: 19+ additional GOP districts
